MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RICK RAMSEY'S Petition For Order Permitting Late Claim Against City And County Of San Francisco.
APPEARANCES: KAREN E. KIRBY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (C.C.S.F., 415.554.3891) APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT AND OPPOSING PARTY. NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.
RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE INCAPACITY. ORDER SIGNED. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
